name: ASUS ROG STRIX B760-F GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7800+(OC) - Intel B760 Chipset - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: ASUS ROG STRIX B760-F GAMING WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Gaming-focused ATX motherboard with B760 chipset, PCIe 5.0 support, and Wi-Fi 6E.
